text: Retrieval-augmented generation combines document retrieval with LLM inference to improve factual grounding and answer quality.
Caching reduces repeated retrieval and LLM work, lowering latency and cost for repeated queries in production systems.
Horizontal scaling of the API layer allows a RAG service to handle higher request throughput behind a load balancer.
Observability in a production AI system typically includes structured logging, latency metrics, tracing, and error-rate dashboards.
GPU-backed inference can improve throughput and latency for large language models, but it increases operational complexity and cost.
